_comment: NPC: Li Qiqing (李齐青). Canon ID: N14. Li Muwan's older brother; raised her after their parents died; elite Luo He Sect disciple in Fire Burn Country (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N14, L25, F15). Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Li Qiqing
cultivation: elite Luo He Sect disciple (Core Formation tier)
personality: protective older brother; principled elite disciple

perception_tiers.mortal: A composed cultivator with a scholar's bearing

note: Li Muwan's older brother; raised her after their parents died. Elite Luo He Sect disciple in Fire Burn Country. Source: CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N14, L25, F15; ri_canon_database.json N14.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
